stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA's GTC 2026 event unveiled new Blackwell and Vera Rubin AI architectures, but experts question if the stock has a 'problem' amid YTD -4% decline and China market adaptations with Groq-like chips. Economically, AI demand remains robust boosting data center revenue, but valuation concerns and competition weigh. Market psychology: FOMO on AI vs profit-taking after massive gains. Historical parallels: Post-2023 hype corrections like 2022 -50% drop. Analogies: 1. Like a rocket burning hot but risking burnout from high altitude. 2. High-performance engine in traffic jam of macro risks.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Mixed X sentiment on NVDA YTD performance; news highlights potential issues despite announcements. Web searches show expert debates on stock problems, premarket little changed.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dips for 10% rebound on AI tailwinds if Fed dovish.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 8% downside on valuation reset amid war/oil distraction.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Escalating AI competition, Fed hawkishness, geopolitical supply chain hits.

stocks.justification: High news volume but conflicting signals from bullish tech event vs bearish expert views.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil surges above $100 on Iran war, attacks on energy facilities; XOM benefits as major producer. Economic: Higher input costs but profits soar on pricing power. Psychology: Risk-on shift to commodities amid war fears. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine invasion oil rally. Analogies: 1. Filling up gas tank during shortage - demand inelastic. 2. Safe harbor in storm for dividend seekers.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web/X posts highlight energy strength despite market shrug; oil at $101, war drags on favoring supermajors.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 12-15% gains if oil >$110 sustained.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if quick resolution caps prices.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: De-escalation lowers oil, recession curbs demand.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst from oil prices/war, historical precedent strong.

stocks.impact_theory: Middle East escalation boosts defense spending; LMT key missile/F-35 supplier. Economic: Govt contracts stable in uncertainty. Psychology: Flight to safety/defense plays. Parallels: Post-9/11 surge. Analogies: 1. Blacksmith thriving in wartime forge. 2. Insurance policy payout in disaster.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X mentions defense primed; war news implies higher budgets, energy stocks but defense correlated.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10% upside on contract wins.

stocks.justification: Indirect mentions but logical extension of war news.

stocks.impact_theory: Top gainer +19% post-Q4 earnings call prep; satellite demand amid global tensions. Economic: LEO competition but GEO niche. Psychology: Small cap momentum. Parallels: Earnings pops in volatile markets. Analogies: 1. Rocket launch breaking orbit. 2. Underdog scoring in finals.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Listed as top gainer in Morningstar/Yahoo; earnings conference March 17 likely positive.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Momentum trade 30% more if volume sustains.

stocks.justification: Strong daily move but limited news depth.

stocks.impact_theory: Tim Cook denies retirement rumors; stock correcting in channel amid oil/war distraction. Economic: China sales pressure. Psychology: Leadership stability reassures. Parallels: Succession fears like 2011 Jobs. Analogies: 1. Captain steadying ship in storm. 2. Evergreen tree weathering winds.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Denial quells rumors; X charts show channel support.

stocks.justification: Specific news but minor vs macro.
